svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="svm-architecture-revised" name="Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1267" dy="915" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1280" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;" value="Deployment Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="680" x="232.5" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frontend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#60a5fa;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Frontend
Vercel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="240" x="40" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#4ade80;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="API Server
HF Space (FastAPI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="125" width="255" x="445" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dataset" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#f59e0b;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Dataset Repo
Hugging Face Dataset" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="820" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="artifacts" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#f87171;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Artifact Repo
Hugging Face Hub" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="103" width="260" x="442.5" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="frontend" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2.5;" target="api" value="predict / similar / thumbnail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0769" y="20" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2.5;exitX=0;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="frontend" value="prediction / results / image"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="17" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="650.0000000000002" y="221.45000000000005" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="518.96" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2.5;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="dataset" value="read train CSV"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="570" y="210" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2.5;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="artifacts" value="load model artifacts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.037" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="560" y="581" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8Fus-sRmiDmcm3eY6SQ7-6" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="75" x="50" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8Fus-sRmiDmcm3eY6SQ7-8" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="35" x="475" y="277.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8Fus-sRmiDmcm3eY6SQ7-15" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="45" x="465" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8Fus-sRmiDmcm3eY6SQ7-16" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="840" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
